title: shivparvatia monantha
intro: Shivparvatia monantha, also known as the Himalayan moonseed, is a perennial climber with medicinal properties. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, diarrhea, and skin infections, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Shivparvatia monantha include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make decoctions, infusions, and powders, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
